title: Rewrite as a quadratic
text: Recognize this as a quadratic equation in terms of sin $$x$$.

title: Solve for sin $$x$$
text: Solve the quadratic equation for sin $$x$$ (e.g., by factoring or quadratic formula).

title: Find solutions for sin $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{4}$$
text: Determine the values of $$x$$ in (0, 2pi) where sin $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{4}$$.
